title: Banilla Ice
description: Opinionated performance tweaks and visual upgrades while preserving the vanilla Minecraft experience.
body:
# Banilla Ice

Opinionated performance tweaks and visual upgrades while preserving the vanilla Minecraft experience. This modpack is a great alternative to a vanilla instance, as it is compatible with vanilla servers while still providing some worthwhile upgrades to the client.

## Notable features
- Controller support
- Shaders (Complementary Shaders v4 included in modpack!)
- Eating animations
- Performance improvements
